calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Continued To Apr-11-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Gener D. Benitiz appeared for plaintiff the Law Offices of Crisostomo G. Ibarra.
Crisostomo G. Ibarra, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearnce by defendants Francisco Sibal, Aleli Sibal, Phoenix Publishing House, Inc. or FAS Development Group, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant Phoenix Publishing House, Inc. on October 8, 2009.
Default was entered against defendants Francisco Sibal and Aleli Sibal on March 5, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant FAS Development Group, Inc. on June 8, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendants Antonio Tanseco and Francisco Sibal, Jr. on March 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Law Offices of Cristostomo G. Ibarra, and against the Defaulted Defendants Phoenix Publishing House, Inc., Francisco Sibal, Aleli Sibal and FAS Development Group, Inc. as follows:

As to defendants Francisco Sibal & Aleli Sibal, jointly & severally:
Damages/Principal - $19,589.58.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,835.83.

As to defendants Francisco Sibal & Phoenix Publishing House, Inc, jointly & severally:
Damages/Principal - 13,203.58.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,281.43.

As to defendants Francisco Sibal & FAS Development Group, Inc, joint & severally:
Damages/Principal - 2,026.73.
Prejudgment Interest - 810.70.

Costs as to all defendants - $775.00.

Total - $49,552.85

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
